reason: PERMISSION_REGISTRY library is published in W2 Stream 2 PR1 but not wired into any consumer yet. Stream 2 PR3 adds the materialization script + binds the registry in JwtAuthGuard + the @RequirePermission resolution path; Stream 3 expands the registry to cover the existing ~213 call sites. Until PR3 lands the library has no importers — by design.
Phantom dependency. argon2 is canonical for password hashing (W5.C dep registry). bcrypt remains in package.json as a legacy carve-out per tools/approved-deps.json but no source file imports it.
